args.code: (() => { let t=null; document.querySelectorAll('main,[role="main"],div,section').forEach((el)=>{ const oy=getComputedStyle(el).overflowY; if((oy==='auto'||oy==='scroll') && el.scrollHeight>el.clientHeight+20){ if(!t||el.clientHeight>t.clientHeight) t=el; } }); const btns=[...document.querySelectorAll('button')]; const byText=(re)=>btns.filter(b=>re.test((b.innerText||'').trim())).length; const byAria=(re)=>[...document.querySelectorAll('[aria-label]')].filter(e=>re.test(e.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')).length; const feedHeads=[...document.querySelectorAll('h2,h3,[role="heading"]')].filter(e=>/^feed post$/i.test((e.textContent||'').trim())).length; return JSON.stringify({ mainSH: t?t.scrollHeight:0, mainTop: t?t.scrollTop:0, follow: byText(/^(Follow|Connect)$/), repost: byAria(/^Repost/i), comment: byAria(/comment/i), feedPostHeadings: feedHeads, activityUrn: document.querySelectorAll('[data-urn*="activity"], [data-chameleon-result-urn*="activity"]').length }); })()
